arabic: الْقَهْوَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ مَشْرُوبٌ أَصِيلٌ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ. تُصْنَعُ مِنَ الْبُنِّ مَعَ الْهَيْلِ وَالزَّعْفَرَانِ أَحْيَانًا. تُقَدَّمُ فِي فِنَاجِينَ صَغِيرَةٍ بِلَا سُكَّرٍ. يَرْفُضُ الضَّيْفُ الْقَهْوَةَ بِهَزِّ الْفِنْجَانِ يَمِينًا وَيَسَارًا. إِنَّ تَقْدِيمَ الْقَهْوَةِ عِنْدَ الاسْتِقْبَالِ وَاجِبٌ اجْتِمَاعِيٌّ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ الْخَلِيجِيَّةِ.
translation: Arapska kafa je originalno piće u arapskoj kulturi. Pravi se od kafe s kardamomom, a ponekad i šafranom. Servira se u malim šoljicama bez šećera. Gost odbija kafu mahanjem šoljice lijevo-desno. Nuđenje kafe pri dočeku je društvena obaveza u kulturi Zaliva.
translationEn: Arabic coffee is an authentic drink in Arab culture. It is made from coffee with cardamom and sometimes saffron. It is served in small cups without sugar. A guest declines coffee by shaking the cup left and right. Serving coffee upon welcoming guests is a social obligation in Gulf culture.
